excluded.reason: Header is always on bg-charcoal, no light variant
This is a site header nav, not breadcrumbs

extra.description: All focus-visible outlines use outline-dotted (not outline-dashed) across HeaderMainItem links, buttons, and HeaderMainSubItem links
Desktop search submit button shows focus-visible outline (dotted, 2px, white, offset-2) when focused via keyboard
Mobile search submit button shows focus-visible outline when focused via keyboard
SEP mobile button (above nav bar) shows focus-visible outline
SEP desktop CTA link shows focus-visible outline
Mobile CTA link at bottom of mobile menu shows focus-visible outline
Mobile hamburger toggle button shows focus-visible outline
Header-main-spacer does not add any visible height or gap when the header is in its default (non-scrolling) state
Mobile hamburger icon is visible (white) against bg-charcoal background on both PHP frontend and TSX editor
When fixedOnScrollMobile=true and mobile menu is open, header stays fixed at top even when scrolling down
Mobile menu content scrolls within viewport bounds — max-height constrained to viewport height minus header bar
Mobile menu close animation is smooth — no visible border/padding jump when menu closes
